full_text:
Xiahou [unknown] (Zizang) 夏侯? (子臧)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou [unknown] (夏侯?), styledZizang (子臧). Slandered their older brother, Xiahou Mao, after they were caught being bad by him. Xiahou [unknown] was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
